item.description:
What's New

  • add macOS-15.4-24E246
  • add macOS-15.0-24A5264n
  • add macOS-15.0-24A5279h
  • add macOS-15.0-24A5289h
  • add macOS-15.0-24A5298h
  • add macOS-12.4-21F5048e
  • add macOS-12.4-21F5058e
  • add macOS-12.4-21F5048e
  • add macOS-12.4-21F5063e
  • add macOS-12.4-21F5071b
  • add macOS-12.5-21G5027d
  • add macOS-12.5-21G5037d
  • add macOS-12.5-21G5046c
  • add macOS-12.5-21G5056b
  • add macOS-12.5-21G5063a
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5286j
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5295h
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5295i
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5365d
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5373b
  • add macOS-13.0-22A379
  • add macOS-13.1-22C5033e
  • add macOS-13.1-22C5044e
  • add macOS-13.1-22C5050e
  • add macOS-13.1-22C5059b
  • add macOS-13.2-22D5027d
  • add macOS-13.2-22D5038i
  • add macOS-13.3-22E5219e
  • add macOS-13.3-22E5230e
  • add macOS-13.3-22E5236f
  • add macOS-13.3-22E5246b
  • add macOS-13.4-22F5027f
  • add macOS-13.4-22F5037d
  • add macOS-13.4-22F5049e
  • add macOS-13.4-22F5059b
  • add macOS-13.4-22F62
  • add macOS-13.4-22F63
  • add macOS-13.5-22G5027e
  • add macOS-12.5-21G69
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5321d
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5342f
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5352e
  • add macOS-13.0-22A5358e
  • add macOS-13.5-22G5038d
  • add macOS-13.5-22G5048d
  • add macOS-13.5-22G5059d
  • add macOS-13.5-22G5072a
  • add macOS-14.0-23A5257q
  • add macOS-14.0-23A5276g

Fixes

  • add download retry and prevent scan PR merge conflicts
  • prevent duplicate cache entries on scan branches
  • prevent scan workflow from deleting previously merged release data
  • fix scan commit step failing with temp file error
  • use full clone to fix object store error in scan workflow
  • use local git config for commit signing in scan workflow
  • stop clobbering TMPDIR in scan commit step
  • force checkout when creating scan branch
  • simplify scan workflow to eliminate data loss
  • restore 3 missing entries in releases.json
  • clear URLCache on refresh so new data is fetched

Under the Hood

  • remove scannerVersion and add trailing newlines to JSON output

Documentation

  • fix file counts and document missing justfile tasks
